codeReview.summary: GraphRowContent is the pure-inner composing GraphCell + pill cluster + subject (flex, tail-truncated) + 140pt author + 64pt TimelineView age. Pills filter tags, cap at 3 with +N overflow. RelativeAgeFormatter handles the documented breakpoints including future-date clamp to "just now". RefPill branches on RefKind: HEAD is outlined accent, localBranch is filled accent, remoteBranch is secondary gray, tag → EmptyView. GraphRowRefs.enrich is a pure function that (1) drops tag refs, (2) prepends a synthetic .head when currentBranch matches an existing .localBranch on that commit, (3) returns unchanged rows when refsBySHA is empty. 7 GraphRowRefs unit tests pin every branch (populate, skip-tags, prepend-head, no-match, detached, empty-map, field-preservation). 9 GraphRowContent unit tests pin every RelativeAgeFormatter breakpoint. 8 snapshot cases md5-distinct (single row / single local / local+remote / overflow +2 / HEAD pill trio / long-subject / selected background / dark-mode parity). Determinism achieved by stamping fixture commits at Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0) so the TimelineView-driven age resolves to a stable bucket.

issues.description: Ownership crossover: GraphRowRefs.swift lives in Sources/Git/Layout/ (git-engine-worker ownership per INTERFACES.md §3) but was written by the swiftui-worker responsible for M4-graph-row-meta. Handoff flagged this explicitly. The file is pure post-layout enrichment — sensible as a sibling to GraphLayout.swift. Either (a) formally reclassify Sources/Git/Layout/GraphRowRefs.swift as cross-archetype in INTERFACES.md, or (b) move to Sources/Git/Layout/Models/ if strict ownership matters. Non-blocking.

`TimelineView(.periodic(from: .now, by: 60))` re-renders a 64pt Text every minute per visible row. For 200 visible rows this is 200 re-renders/min — cheap but wasteful. An app-level TimelineView that broadcasts the current bucket through an @Observable or .environment(minuteTick) would scale better. Defer to M7 or later when diff pane adds more TimelineView consumers.

`ForEach(Array(pillsToShow.enumerated()), id: \.offset)` uses offset as id — fine for a static 3-slot cap, but RefKind itself is Equatable & Hashable (verified by isTag pattern matching elsewhere) and using the ref itself as id would be cleaner and survive animations. Minor.

Integer division on seconds uses approximate month (30d) and year (365d) constants. Near a month/year boundary a commit can flip between bucket labels in a way a user might notice. Calendar-aware formatting is overkill for 64pt labels, but flag if users complain.

testsSpotChecked.name: enrichPrependsHEADForCurrentBranch
testsSpotChecked.observation: `.head` lands first in refs — HEAD → main reading order.

testsSpotChecked.name: testWithOverflow
testsSpotChecked.observation: md5 4f3cb465 distinct from single-local (037c2508) and local+remote (a1e0fd32).

testsSpotChecked.name: enrichSkipsTags
testsSpotChecked.observation: Belt-and-braces filter exists in both GraphRowRefs (pre-render) and GraphRowContent.visibleRefs (render-time).
